Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to occur after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation until the next decision activity (e.g., SW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total elapsed time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to be followed by SW-EIC Major Revision compared to SW-EIC Minor Revision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants leading to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation when preceded by multiple reviewer agreements (e.g., at least two SW-Reviewer Agreed events)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average time between the last SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in complex reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Elapsed time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in high-performance variants (performance < median variant duration)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to occur after the final SW-Reviewer Agreed in cases with repeated reviewer invitations
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants where reviewer changes occurred
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation when all assigned reviewers agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that include revision cycles (e.g., RW-Initial Reviewer Selection appears later)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'RW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Time from the first SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in multi-reviewer scenarios
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation after the completion of all required reviewer agreements
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation and the subsequent editor decision (e.g., SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Accept, or any SW-EIC * activity)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that resulted in acceptance
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Elapsed time of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation phase in comparison with the preceding SW-AE Assign Reviewers phase within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation grouped by case:concept:name to identify outlier cases
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
